html:
Exclusive to:

Swinesbury Fine Grocer's is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in Swinesbury Pig City and sells a variety of Food items to the player.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, Swinesbury Fine Grocer's also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, three Eggplants and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Pillar
    • 2.2 Lamps
    • 2.3 Windows
    • 2.4 Doors
  • 3 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering Swinesbury Fine Grocer's, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Storeowner Pig shopkeeper works at the desk.

There is a total of eleven display stands in the shop. Ten of them will sell the items below except ice, and the last will sell exclusively ice.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name
Meat 5
Coconut 3
Pumpkin 3
Frog Legs 2
Drumstick 2
Eggplant 2
Corn 2
Berries 1
Ice 1
Watermelon 1
Sweet Potato 1
Carrot 1
Pomegranate 1
Banana 1

Decor

  • Sacle
  • Menu
  • Menu

  • Planed Wood Column Front

"pig_shop_produce"
“There's fresh produce in there.”
–Wilson
“I can't believe I ever took food stores for granted.”
–Willow
“Shop of food!”
–Wolfgang
“Could these goods fill the emptiness within me?”
–Wendy
“CONTAINS PACKETS OF BIOLOGICAL ENERGY”
–WX-78
“A delightful place to pick up groceries.”
–Wickerbottom
“Want anything, Lucy?”
–Woodie
“A simple grocer.”
–Maxwell
“Contains a smorgasbord of fine foods for sale.”
–Wagstaff
“I döth require meat!”
–Wigfrid
“They might have tasty fruit inside.”
–Webber
“Always ready to veg out.”
–Walani
“I'm saved!”
–Warly
“T'ward off th'scurvy.”
–Woodlegs
“NUM NUMS WITHIN”
–Wilba
“Belly stuff inside”
–Wormwood
“Food!”
–Wheeler

If the player obtains the Key to the City, Swinesbury Fine Grocer's also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, three Eggplants and four Pig Skins.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Swinesbury Fine Grocer's là một Cấu trúc Cửa hàng Lợn sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy ở Thành phố Lợn Swinesbury và bán nhiều loại Thực phẩm cho người chơi.

'''Swinesbury Fine Grocer's''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in [[Pig City|Swinesbury Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[Food]] items to the player.

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], Swinesbury Fine Grocer's also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using four [[Boards]], three [[Eggplant]]s and four [[Pig Skin]]s.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering Swinesbury Fine Grocer's, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. A [[Storeowner Pig]] shopkeeper works at the desk.

There is a total of eleven display stands in the shop. Ten of them will sell the items below except ice, and the last will sell exclusively ice.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:
